title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 431.140 - Joint obligations — suit brought against whom
text:
431.140.  Joint obligations — suit brought against whom. — In all cases of joint obligations and joint assumptions of copartners or others, suits may be brought and prosecuted against any one or more of those who are so liable.
(RSMo 1939 § 3343) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2956; 1919 § 2158; 1909 § 2772
